description: Required HTTP request headers. Every SDK MUST send these on both /v1-evaluate and /v1-verify-permit.

required_headers.name: Authorization
required_headers.description: The same api_key MUST also appear in the JSON body for wire parity.

required_headers.name: User-Agent
required_headers.description: SDK name and semver. Suffixes (node version, runtime, etc.) are allowed.

required_headers.name: X-Request-ID
required_headers.description: Per-request correlation ID. Hex, UUID v4 recommended. MUST be unique per request.

notes: TypeScript SDK emits UA of the form `@atlasent/sdk/<semver> node/<node-version>`. This intentionally does NOT match `atlasent-<lang>/<semver>` above; both are accepted by the contract (see policy_lint allowance).
Servers MUST accept either `Authorization: Bearer <key>` OR `api_key` in the body; new SDKs SHOULD send both.
